name: Mucuna pruriens
summary: Decision-ready summary: Mucuna pruriens is best framed for dopamine precursor support; Parkinsonian context; mood/motivation context; safety screen: psychosis/bipolar risk; levodopa medications; MAOIs.
description: Mucuna pruriens contains bioactive constituents that support dopaminergic tone, which can plausibly affect mood, motor control, and neurochemical signaling relevant to movement symptoms.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.

claimMap.claim: v9.4: Human evidence involves L-DOPA/Parkinson’s or infertility contexts; block monetized wellness positioning.
claimMap.notes: v9.4: Human evidence involves L-DOPA/Parkinson’s or infertility contexts; block monetized wellness positioning.

qualifiers.dose_or_duration: Clinical dosing is context-specific and L-DOPA-dependent; not suitable for generic consumer dosing
